imao",name="小黑猫",stage=1,title="小黑猫",types={"普通系"}},{head="Head_3569",id="pet_000490",illustration="JL_heimaowushi",level=40,name="黑猫巫师",stage=2,title="黑猫巫师",types={"普通系"}}},name="小黑猫进化链"},evo_000179={chain={{head="Head_3594",id="pet_000509",illustration="JL_songzai",name="松仔",stage=1,title="松仔",types={"草系","武系"}},{head="Head_3595",id="pet_000510",illustration="JL_yesongyang",level=16,name="松叶羊",stage=2,title="松叶羊",types={"草系","武系"}},{head="Head_3596",id="pet_000511",illustration="JL_zhenyexunlin",level=36,name="针叶巡林",stage=3,title="针叶巡林",types={"草系","武系"}}},name="松仔进化链"},evo_000180={chain={{head="Head_3597",id="pet_000512",illustration="JL_shuidishe",name="水滴蛇",stage=1,title="水滴蛇",types={"水系","武系"}},{head="Head_3598",id="pet_000513",illustration="JL_shuishesuo",level=16,name="水蛇锁",stage=2,title="水蛇锁",types={"水系","武系"}},{head="Head_3599",id="pet_000514",illustration="JL_youshemoshi",level=36,name="游蛇魔使",stage=3,title="游蛇魔使",types={"水系","武系"}}},name="水滴蛇进化链"},evo_000181={chain={{head="Head_3600",id="pet_000515",illustration="JL_xiaoyongshi",name="小勇狮",stage=1,title="小勇狮",types={"火系","武系"}},{head="Head_3601",id="pet_000516",illustration="JL_chiyanshi",level=16,name="炽焰狮",stage=2,title="炽焰狮",types={"火系","武系"}},{head="Head_3602",id="pet_000517",illustration="JL_chixinyongshi",level=36,name="炽心勇狮",stage=3,title="炽心勇狮",types={"火系","武系"}}},name="小勇狮进化链"},evo_000182={chain={{head="Head_3603",id="pet_000518",illustration="JL_maotouxiaozhu",name="毛头小蛛",stage=1,title="毛头小蛛",types={"虫系","地系"}},{cond="身高50%~100%",head="Head_3604",id="pet_000519",illustration="JL_buchenchangrong",level=30,name="捕尘长绒",stage=2,title="捕尘长绒",types={"虫系","地系"}}},name="毛头小蛛进化链（捕尘长绒分支）"},evo_000183={chain={{head="Head_3614",id="pet_000529",illustration="JL_shiguangwengweng",name="嗜光嗡嗡",stage=1,title="嗜光嗡嗡",types={"恶系","光系"}},{cond="击败3只光系精灵",head="Head_3615",id="pet_000530",illustration="JL_qieguangwen",level=28,name="窃光蚊",stage=2,title="窃光蚊",types={"恶系","光系"}}},name="嗜光嗡嗡进化链"},evo_000184={chain={{head= uo_yidi",name="波波螺",stage=1,title="波波螺（被污染的样子）",types={"地系","水系"}},{form="被污染的样子",head="Head_3512",id="pet_000438",illustration="JL_xiaoboluo_yidi",level=16,name="消波螺",stage=2,title="消波螺（被污染的样子）",types={"地系","水系"}},{form="被污染的样子",head="Head_3513",id="pet_000439",illustration="JL_shiboluo_yidi",level=32,name="嗜波螺",stage=3,title="嗜波螺（被污染的样子）",types={"地系","水系"}}},name="波波螺进化链（被污染的样子）"},evo_000249={chain={{form="燃了鸭",head="Head_3495",id="pet_000421",illustration="JL_yajiji_ranleya",name="鸭吉吉",stage=1,title="鸭吉吉（燃了鸭）",types={"普通系"}}},name="鸭吉吉进化链（燃了鸭）"},evo_000250={chain={{head="Head_3531",id="pet_000453",illustration="JL_xiaoxueren",name="小雪人",stage=1,title="小雪人",types={"冰系"}},{cond="生涯使用[滚雪球]15次",head="Head_3532",id="pet_000454",illustration="JL_xueguai",level=40,name="雪怪",stage=2,title="雪怪",types={"冰系"}}},name="小雪人进化链"},evo_000251={chain={{head="Head_3487",id="pet_000415",illustration="JL_xiaochoudoudou",name="小丑豆豆",stage=1,title="小丑豆豆",types={"恶系"}},{cond="跟随1分钟",head="Head_3488",id="pet_000416",illustration="JL_xiaochoutu",level=16,name="小丑兔",stage=2,title="小丑兔",types={"恶系"}},{head="Head_3489",id="pet_000417",illustration="JL_xiaochougongjue",level=36,name="小丑公爵",stage=3,title="小丑公爵",types={"恶系"}}},name="小丑豆豆进化链"},evo_000252={chain={{head="Head_3572",id="pet_000493",illustration="JL_baoyanzai",name="爆焰仔",stage=1,title="爆焰仔",types={"火系","龙系"}},{cond="生涯使用[流星火雨]15次",head="Head_3573",id="pet_000494",illustration="JL_baoyanpengpeng",level=40,name="爆焰喷喷",stage=2,title="爆焰喷喷",types={"火系","龙系"}}},name="爆焰仔进化链"},evo_000253={chain={{head="Head_3577",id="pet_000498",illustration="JL_moyoushi",name="墨鱿士",stage=1,title="墨鱿士",types={"幽系"}},{cond="击败3只萌系精灵",head="Head_3578",id="pet_000499",illustration="JL_hunluanyoucai",level=32,name="混乱鱿彩",stage=2,title="混乱鱿彩",types={"幽系"}}},name="墨鱿士进化链（混乱鱿彩分支）"},evo_000254={chain={{head="Head_3577",id="pet_000498",illustration="JL_moyoushi",name="墨鱿士",stage=1,title="墨鱿士",types={"幽系"}},{cond="击败3只恶系精灵",head="Head_3579",id="pet_000500",illustra
